title: SMP Mods Client
description: A client-side HermitCraft inspired mod pack.
body:
# SMP Mods

This is the client pack for SMP Mods, a collection of mod packs designed to enhance the SMP experience and make it more enjoyable.

This pack is built upon the mods in the [Hermitcraft](https://hermitcraft.com) server with a few additional mods and added features.

For more information on SMP Mods, visit the server pack: [SMP Mods Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smp-mods-server).

## Features of the Client Pack:

- **SMP Mods:** SMP Mods Client adds all the necessary mods for the client to work with [SMP Mods](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smp-mods-server).
- **QOL Mods:** Includes some lightweight Quality of Life mods.
- **FPS Mods:** Incorporates mods to improve FPS.
